case_title: GOLDEN GATE REPORTERS VS CONE FREDERICK DBA LAW OFFICES OF FREDERICK CONE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $203.60 FILED BY GOLDEN GATE REPORTERS AS TO DEFENDANT CONE FREDERICK DBA LAW OFFICES OF FREDERICK CONE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-22-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 01

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOLDEN GATE REPORTERS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CONE FREDERICK DBA LAW OFFICES OF FREDERICK CONE $203.60 PRINCIPAL, $17.77 INTEREST, $33.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $254.37 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT CONE FREDERICK DBA LAW OFFICES OF FREDERICK CONE
